description: Multi-voice arpeggiator: describe the character; the LLM designs ONE repeating arp cell (chord-degree steps, rests, accents, octave contour) and a mechanical expander tiles it over the scene's per-bar chords at 1/4, 1/8, or 1/16 notes — always chord tones, never off-key. The cell is then split vertically (pitch bands) or horizontally (alternating bars) across 1-4 voices, each on its own Surge XT track as one voice-group.
